assignments.name: ASN_Move_to_Inbound_or_Return_path_queue
assignments.label: ASN Move to Inbound or Return path queue

assignments.name: ASN_Update_LDC_First_Call_Date
assignments.label: ASN Update LDC First Call Date

assignments.name: Update_Lead_Status_from_Manual_Override
assignments.label: Update Lead Status from Manual Override

assignments.name: Update_OR_to_Added_to_Sequence
assignments.label: Update OR to Added to Sequence

assignments.name: Update_Status_Assigned_OR_Stage_Added_to_Sequence
assignments.label: Update Status = Assigned - OR Stage - Added to Sequence

decisions.description: Process Builder - LDC - Update First Call
decisions.name: DEC_LDC_Last_Call_Task_Change
decisions.label: LDC Last Call Task Change

decisions.description: Process Builder - Last Assigned Manually Date/Time Stamp
decisions.name: DEC_Lead_Assigned_or_Pulled
decisions.label: Lead Assigned or Pulled

decisions.description: Process Builder - DE first distributed clear queues
decisions.name: DEC_Move_to_Inbound_or_Return_path_queue
decisions.label: Move to Inbound or Return path queue

rules.name: Yes_DEC_Move_to_Inbound_or_Return_path_queue
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND ((2 AND 3) OR (4 AND 3) OR (5 AND 3) OR (6 AND 7 AND 8))
rules.label: Yes

decisions.description: Process Builder - Clear OMQ date and OR recycling days
decisions.name: DEC_Return_to_OMQ
decisions.label: Return to OMQ?

decisions.description: Process Builder - Clear OMQ date and OR recycling days
decisions.name: DEC_Return_via_RPQ
decisions.label: Return via RPQ

rightValue.stringValue: CC - Not Yet Qualified - Qualifying Soon

decisions.name: Lead_Status_Need_Changed_Also_dec
decisions.label: Lead Status Need Changed Also dec

decisions.description: Checks if any of the fields "SMS Opt Out", "Email Opt Out", or "Do Not Call" have been updated. Should any of these be changed to true, it updates the "Do Not Call Date" field to today's date.If any are unchecked, thereby changing from true to false, it clears the value in the "Do Not Call Date" field accordingly.
decisions.name: Opt_Out_Update
decisions.label: Opt Out Update?

Flow.description: Updates and Actions before save on Lead 02/15/2024 - Added node to flow to update date Opt Outs were set to true. 09/20/2024 - Added to existing node to not move OR Stage and Status if currently in Working and change in Rev Sequence 12/22/2024 - Added an override to the manual stage null check so that if the Update Status & OR Stage = Assigned was visited, that the updates are not made 5/7/25 - BW - Revisited the logic structure to provide more consistent structure and less chance of overriding updates 10/29/2025 - LK - Replaced RingDNA Latest Disposition Field with new native field " Most Recent Disposition"

formulas.name: forD_DoNotCallDate
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.DoNotCall}), {!$Record.DoNotCall} = True), {!$Flow.CurrentDate}, IF( AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.DoNotCall}), {!$Record.DoNotCall} = False), Null, {!$Record.Do_Not_Call_Date__c} )
)

formulas.name: forD_EmailOptOutDate
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.HasOptedOutOfEmail}), {!$Record.HasOptedOutOfEmail} = True), {!$Flow.CurrentDate}, IF( AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.HasOptedOutOfEmail}), {!$Record.HasOptedOutOfEmail} = False), Null, {!$Record.Email_Opt_Out_Date__c} )
)

formulas.name: forD_SMSOptOutDate
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.ringdna__HasOptedOutOfSms__c}), {!$Record.ringdna__HasOptedOutOfSms__c} = True), {!$Flow.CurrentDate}, IF( AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.ringdna__HasOptedOutOfSms__c}), {!$Record.ringdna__HasOptedOutOfSms__c} = False), Null, {!$Record.SMS_Opt_Out_Date__c} )
)

formulas.name: forREC2OutreachStage
formulas.expression: If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - Budget Issue", "Recycled - Not Interested - Budget Issue", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - Feature / Product Limitation", "Recycled - Features Request", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - In Contract", "Recycled - In Contract", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - Price Too High", "Recycled - No Budget", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Non Primary", "Recycled - Non Primary", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Yet Qualified (Dreamer)", "Recycled - Not Yet Qualified", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - Using Competitor", "Recycled - Using Competitor", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - Happy w/ Manual System or P&P", "Recycled - Not Interested - Happy w/ P&P", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - Hung Up on Multiple Times", "Recycled - Not Interested - Hung Up on Multiple Times", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Public School (K12 with ECE/Headstart)", "Recycled - Public School (K12 with ECE/Headstart)", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "REC - Not Interested - Time of Year", "Recycled - Not Interested - Time of Year", "Recycled - Not Ready" )))))))))))

formulas.name: forUNQ2OutreachStage
formulas.expression: If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Non Target - Not ECE", "Unqualified - Not ECE", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Prospect Requested Do Not Call", "Unqualified - Do not Contact", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Existing Customer", "Unqualified - Existing Customer", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Non Target - International", "Unqualified - International", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Non Target - Language Barrier", "Unqualified - Language Barrier", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Out of Business", "Unqualified - Out of Business", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Non Target - Parent", "Unqualified - Parent", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Under Capacity (<10)", "Unqualified - Under Capacity", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Enterprise", "Unqualified - Enterprise", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Public School - No headstart", "Unqualified - Public School - No headstart", If({!$Record.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c} = "UNQ - Invalid Data", "Unqualified - Invalid Data", "Unqualified - Unknown" )))))))))))

formulas.name: MovetoInboundorReturnPath
formulas.expression: AND( ISCHANGED({!$Record.OwnerId}), OR( AND( PRIORVALUE({!$Record.OwnerId}) = 'HubSpot Integration User', BEGINS({!$Record.OwnerId}, '00G') ), AND( PRIORVALUE({!$Record.OwnerId}) = 'Hubspot Form Queue', BEGINS({!$Record.OwnerId}, '00G') ), AND( PRIORVALUE({!$Record.OwnerId}) = 'Free Trial Signup Queue', BEGINS({!$Record.OwnerId}, '00G') ), AND( BEGINS(PRIORVALUE({!$Record.OwnerId}), '00G'), {!$Record.OwnerId} = 'Return Path Queue' ) ) )

formulas.name: Newlyassignedlead
formulas.expression: AND( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status} , 'Assigned'), {!$Record.Troops_HS_return_path_trigger__c} = FALSE, {!$Record.Troops_PTL_return_path_trigger__c} = FALSE, NOT(PRIORVALUE({!$Record.OwnerId}) = '00G1I000002EeRIUA0'), {!$Record.IsConverted} = FALSE )

formulas.name: Returnpathlead
formulas.expression: AND( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Status} , 'Assigned'), {!$Record.IsConverted} = FALSE, OR( AND( {!$Record.Troops_HS_return_path_trigger__c} = TRUE, {!$Record.LOGIC_Open_HS_task__c} > 0 ), OR( {!$Record.Troops_PTL_return_path_trigger__c} = TRUE, {!$Record.LOGIC_Open_PTL_task__c} > 0 ) ), NOT(PRIORVALUE({!$Record.OwnerId} ) = '00G1I000002EeRIUA0') )

formulas.name: Slack2
formulas.expression: 'You have been assigned a new ' & IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'User Outreach'), 'Free Trial sign up', TEXT({!$Record.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c}) ) & ' lead' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '<https://brightwheel1.my.salesforce.com/' & {!$Record.Id} & '|[View in Salesforce]>' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Lead Source - Detail:* ' & {!$Record.Lead_Source_Detail__c} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Organization:* ' & {!$Record.Company} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*First Name:* ' & {!$Record.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Last Name:* ' & {!$Record.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Email:* ' & {!$Record.Email} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Phone:* ' & {!$Record.Phone} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*State/Province:* ' & {!$Record.State}

Flow.interviewLabel: Lead Updates Before Save Flow CC {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Lead Updates Before Save Flow CC
